agent.name: runtime-bug-hunter
agent.role: Re-audit runtime and control-flow on scoped dashboard and API routes after onboarding and error-boundary fixes.

findings.title: Root global-error UI has no path back to portfolio (unlike app/error.tsx)
findings.description: global-error.tsx now mirrors segment error.tsx: Try again plus a Link to / labeled Portfolio, with production-safe copy. Re-audit confirms parity with app/error.tsx.

proof_hooks.summary: apps/dashboard/app/global-error.tsx:47-58 — flex row with Try again button and Link href="/" children "Portfolio".

history.notes: Re-audit on scoped paths: recovery affordance present; matches segment error boundary.

findings.title: Onboarding cluster POST uses process.cwd() when repo path is not local
findings.description: When repoAccess is a remote URL (does not start with "/"), isLocal is false and repoPath becomes process.cwd(). collectGitHistory and other collectors then read the dashboard working tree, not the target repository, producing misleading or empty artifacts without failing loudly.

proof_hooks.summary: const repoPath = isLocal ? repoAccess : process.cwd() // fallback when remote
POST cluster with repositoryUrl only (no localPath): server uses cwd, not cloned repo.

history.notes: Identified during re-audit of onboarding cluster route.

next_actions.action: Replace cwd fallback with explicit clone or 400 when remote URL has no local checkout.
next_actions.rationale: Prevents silent wrong data in cluster onboarding artifacts.

next_actions.action: Mark Linear PLP-576 verified if tied to f-90f28fa8.
next_actions.rationale: Global error UX fix is complete in repo.
